name: Plantation Broiled Cobia
recipeIngredient: 1 Each Eggplant, sliced into 1/4 inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the fish pieces in lemon juice, salt, and pepper for five minutes.
2. Brush the marinated fish with oil and broil until golden brown.
3. Slice eggplant into 1/4 inch slices.
4. Dip the eggplant slices into flour, beaten egg, and bread crumbs.
5. Bake in a pan with butter.
6. Place the broiled fish on top of the eggplant slices.
7. Arrange on a platter.
8. Garnish with boiled egg and stuffed tomatoes.
Also suitable for any tasty fish.
